issues.description: Missing cost condition: Activate requires ➁ (rest 2 DON!!). DSL must include condition to rest 2 DON cards from cost area.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text explicitly states '[Rush] during this turn' which means the keyword lasts only during your turn, not permanently until end of turn.
Target should clarify 'up to 1' (optional selection) — current ChooseOwnCharacter implies mandatory choice. Consider using optional selection pattern.
